description_long: This object features a central spherical core with a metallic, gear-like texture and a prominent red circular detail at its front, resembling an eye or mechanical iris. Radiating from the sphere are six sharply pointed, blade-like appendages, symmetrically arranged and varying slightly in size and shape, giving the impression of a star or spiked weapon. The blades are metallic gray, with clean, angular facets and a polished finish, suggesting a high degree of sharpness and lethality. The central sphere appears to be constructed from a similar metal, with a subtle seam running horizontally around its circumference. The red detail at the front is semi-translucent, possibly glass or a synthetic material, and adds a menacing, high-tech aesthetic. The overall design is futuristic and aggressive, suitable for a weapon or defensive device in an urban environment.
description: A metallic, spiked spherical object with six sharp, blade-like protrusions and a red, eye-like detail at its center. The design is futuristic and menacing, with a polished metallic finish.
description_view_0: The front view reveals the red, eye-like detail at the center of the sphere, surrounded by six symmetrically arranged, sharp metallic blades.
description_view_1: The side view shows the thin profile of the blades and the spherical core, with the red detail partially visible on the right.
description_view_2: The rear view displays the smooth, metallic sphere without the red detail, and the symmetrical arrangement of the blades.
description_view_3: The opposite side view mirrors view 1, with the red detail partially visible on the left and the thin blade profiles prominent.
attribute_handle_design: spherical metallic core, no traditional handle, smooth surface
attribute_ornamentation: red eye-like glass detail at the center
